heading: Amendments to existing contracts
label: 485h–2 Amendments to existing contracts
text: The Secretary is authorized to negotiate amendments to existing contracts entered into pursuant to subsection (e) of to conform said contracts to the provisions of sections 485h–1 to 485h–5 of this title.section 485h of this title
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Reclamation Project Act of 1939 which comprises this subchapter.
